race.comment: APOLLO TEN (4) has been racing in tougher grade but returns to Gatton where he is unbeaten from two runs. Winning rider Tahlia Fenton is back aboard and won here at her only other ride. Ideally placed in this line-up and should go close. THE LOUVRE (1) returned from a break with a solid third in a BM70 at Toowoomba. Kept fresh for this and expected to go close again. CHARMED PASSAGE (10) has also been racing in tougher grade and will find this more suitable. Placed 2/2 course and distance and expected to improve sharply. XERRI (3) is building to a win and among the chances on best. JEMELDI (7) is in the mix off the low draw.
